agents.name: session-watchdog
agents.role: Monitors Claude Code session; sends autoloop pings; handles REVIEW_GATE

agents.name: staging-watcher
agents.role: Monitors docs/staging/ for new files; sends NTFY to alert CC
agents.produces: NTFY notifications on new staging files

agents.name: discovery-daemon
agents.role: Validates simulation assumptions against real UK market benchmarks

agents.name: sim-runner
agents.role: Runs full 10-year simulation in a loop; writes run_complete markers

agents.name: dispatcher
agents.role: Classifies inbound NTFY messages (URGENT/NORMAL/FYI) using Qwen3:14b

agents.name: ntfy-responder
agents.last_action: Acked message: 'identical machine cadence body repeated over and over again'
agents.role: Receives NTFY messages from Rich; writes from_rich_*.md to staging

agents.name: autonomous-runner
agents.last_action: Retired 2026-07-08 (director decision, docs/staging/AUTONOMOUS_RUNNER_TRUE_RETIREMENT.md): confirmed dead via ps/pstree (no process, no tmux session); start_worker.sh launcher block commented out (durable, will not respawn on stack restart); no other hook in this repo can relaunch it.
agents.role: Runs scheduled Claude Code sessions for background work when session is idle

agents.name: background-worker
agents.role: Runs background automation tasks via local Qwen; respects 16-19 UTC peak hours

agents.name: epistemic-verifier
agents.last_action: Scanned 2 W4_4 seam contracts (wall_envelope + payment_observable_seam) -- PASS, no barrier violations across 6 inbound observable response types
agents.role: Scans phase-close diffs for SIM/company epistemic barrier violations

agents.name: discovery-agent
agents.last_action: Verified 5 Phase-2 archetype dimensions (occupancy, tenure, fuel poverty, payment method, active/passive switcher rate) -- H confidence, ASSUMPTIONS.md new section
agents.role: Validates simulation assumptions against real UK market benchmarks

agents.name: supervisor
agents.last_action: Cycle complete -- current stuck-key unchanged for ~0min
agents.role: Sole authority for turn-granting: polls every 2min, grants one turn via the locked relay when idle+work exists, escalates if grants stop producing progress

agents.name: sanity-daemon
agents.role: Detective/sampling control: population-level consumption/unit-rate/estimated-read checks against domain_invariants.py every 30min
agents.produces: sanity-daemon-log.md entries + one NTFY per new/changed finding set

agents.name: director-comments
agents.role: Validates PIN-authenticated director page comments, stages accepted ones

agents.name: build-executor
agents.role: Governed headless-turn executor: consumes the Rule-0 self-refill draw and lands one gated unit of build work per cycle (SAFE-DARK foundation).
